title: Vacuum Flask 1 Litre | Stainless Steel Insulated Water Bottle | Double Wall Thermal Flask for Hot & Cold Drinks | Leakproof Reusable Drink Bottle for Travel Office Gym School Hiking Picnic & Camping
features: 🔥 LARGE 1 LITRE CAPACITY – Perfect for long days out with enough space for coffee, tea, water, soup & cold drinks.
💧 KEEPS DRINKS HOT & COLD – Double wall insulation keeps drinks hot up to 12 hours & cold up to 24 hours.
💪 STRONG STAINLESS STEEL – Durable & long-lasting design makes it ideal for everyday use, travel & outdoor adventures.
💼 LEAKPROOF & PORTABLE – Secure screw lid prevents leaks & spills, great for work, commuting, school, hiking & camping.
🧼 REUSABLE & EASY TO CLEAN – Wide mouth opening allows simple cleaning & eco-friendly reuse instead of single-use bottles.
description: Stay refreshed all day with this 1 Litre Stainless Steel Vacuum Flask – a large-capacity, reusable thermal bottle designed to keep your drinks hot or cold for hours. With its double wall insulation, it maintains heat for up to 12 hours and keeps drinks chilled for up to 24 hours, making it perfect for coffee, tea, water, soup and more. Built with a durable stainless steel body and a leakproof screw lid, this flask is tough enough for outdoor adventures yet practical for everyday use at work, school, or the gym. Its generous 1L size makes it ideal for long trips, hiking, camping and travel, ensuring you stay hydrated without constant refills. A practical, reusable and easy-to-clean solution, this thermal flask is a reliable choice for anyone who wants to enjoy their favourite drinks on the go.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Office use, Commuting, School, Hiking, Camping, Travel
